productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Slimsoll White Sports Shoes
description: A classic style reinvented, Slimsoll from adidas features a canvas upper that gives great flexibility and feels great around the foot. The contrast synthetic adidas trademark three stripes signifying a mountain, pointing out towards the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved add a touch of gravity to the shoes.UpperUltra low profile and soft textile uppersSmart Adidas three stripes in contrastCentral lace-up Fit for comfortable customised fitSerrated overlay detailing along bordering the tongueLightly padded tongue for snug fitAdidas branding on synthetic patch over heel cupMidsoleFull length phylon midsole for lightweight structureVibeTouch enhanced cushioning on the insole for a comfortable feelSoft, cushy footbed for great comfort all dayOutsoleBranded rubber outsole delivers traction and provides long lasting wearshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washStore away from sunlight
